
# Component catalog

All 40 components shipped in **`@gcds-core/components-v1.1.0`** (v1.1.0). Every row links to a deep-dive file covering props, events, slots, accessibility, and bilingual behaviour.

Looking for something that isn't here? See [Deprecated and not-yet-implemented](#deprecated-and-not-yet-implemented) at the bottom.

## Actions

Interactive triggers for the primary action in a flow.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-button`](../components/gcds-button.md) | `GcdsButton` | The button is an interactive object that emphasizes an action. |

## Inputs

Form fields and their structural support (labels, hints, errors, grouping).

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-checkboxes`](../components/gcds-checkboxes.md) | `GcdsCheckboxes` | Checkboxes provide a set of options for multiple responses. |
| [`gcds-date-input`](../components/gcds-date-input.md) | `GcdsDateInput` | A date input is a space to enter a known date. |
| [`gcds-error-message`](../components/gcds-error-message.md) | `GcdsErrorMessage` | An error message is a description of a problem blocking a user goal. |
| [`gcds-fieldset`](../components/gcds-fieldset.md) | `GcdsFieldset` | A fieldset is a group of multiple form components or elements. |
| [`gcds-file-uploader`](../components/gcds-file-uploader.md) | `GcdsFileUploader` | A file uploader is a space to select and add supporting documentation. |
| [`gcds-hint`](../components/gcds-hint.md) | `GcdsHint` | Hint text under a form field. |
| [`gcds-input`](../components/gcds-input.md) | `GcdsInput` | An input is a space to enter short-form information in response to a question or instruction. |
| [`gcds-label`](../components/gcds-label.md) | `GcdsLabel` | Form field label rendered by other inputs. |
| [`gcds-radios`](../components/gcds-radios.md) | `GcdsRadios` | Radios provide a set of options for a single response. |
| [`gcds-select`](../components/gcds-select.md) | `GcdsSelect` | A select provides a large list of options for single selection. |
| [`gcds-textarea`](../components/gcds-textarea.md) | `GcdsTextarea` | A text area is a space to enter long-form information in response to a question or instruction. |

## Feedback

Surfaces that communicate status, errors, or important messages.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-alert`](../components/gcds-alert.md) | `GcdsAlert` | Alert displays an alert message with an optional heading, icon, and close button. |
| [`gcds-error-summary`](../components/gcds-error-summary.md) | `GcdsErrorSummary` | An error summary is a list of user errors in a form. |
| [`gcds-notice`](../components/gcds-notice.md) | `GcdsNotice` | The notice is a short, prominent message that’s part of the page content. |

## Content

Blocks that present information.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-card`](../components/gcds-card.md) | `GcdsCard` | A card is a box containing structured, actionable content on a single topic. |
| [`gcds-details`](../components/gcds-details.md) | `GcdsDetails` | Details is an interactive switch for a person to expand or collapse content. |
| [`gcds-icon`](../components/gcds-icon.md) | `GcdsIcon` | An icon is a symbol that visually represents an action or idea. |

## Typography

Text-scale primitives.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-heading`](../components/gcds-heading.md) | `GcdsHeading` | A heading is a title that establishes levels of hierarchy to organize page content into a structure and matches Canada. |
| [`gcds-text`](../components/gcds-text.md) | `GcdsText` | Text is a styled and formatted paragraph that displays written content in an accessible way and matches Canada. |

## Layout

Containers and grid primitives that structure a page.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-container`](../components/gcds-container.md) | `GcdsContainer` | A container is a basic box layout with a set width for its contents. |
| [`gcds-grid`](../components/gcds-grid.md) | `GcdsGrid` | A grid is a responsive, flexible column layout to position elements on a page. |
| [`gcds-grid-col`](../components/gcds-grid-col.md) | `GcdsGridCol` | Column inside `<gcds-grid>`. |

## Navigation

Components users move through the site with.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-breadcrumbs`](../components/gcds-breadcrumbs.md) | `GcdsBreadcrumbs` | Breadcrumbs is a path to the current page from each preceding level of the site's hierarchy. |
| [`gcds-breadcrumbs-item`](../components/gcds-breadcrumbs-item.md) | `GcdsBreadcrumbsItem` | Single breadcrumb entry inside `<gcds-breadcrumbs>`. |
| [`gcds-link`](../components/gcds-link.md) | `GcdsLink` | A link is a navigational element that brings a person to a new page, website, file, or section on the current page. |
| [`gcds-nav-group`](../components/gcds-nav-group.md) | `GcdsNavGroup` | Expandable nav cluster inside `<gcds-top-nav>` or `<gcds-side-nav>`. |
| [`gcds-nav-link`](../components/gcds-nav-link.md) | `GcdsNavLink` | Nav item inside `<gcds-top-nav>`, `<gcds-side-nav>`, or `<gcds-nav-group>`. |
| [`gcds-pagination`](../components/gcds-pagination.md) | `GcdsPagination` | Pagination is a division of content into multiple linked pages. |
| [`gcds-side-nav`](../components/gcds-side-nav.md) | `GcdsSideNav` | A side navigation is a vertical list of page links on the left side of the screen. |
| [`gcds-stepper`](../components/gcds-stepper.md) | `GcdsStepper` | A stepper is a progress tracker for a multi-step process. |
| [`gcds-top-nav`](../components/gcds-top-nav.md) | `GcdsTopNav` | A top navigation is a horizontal list of page links. |
| [`gcds-topic-menu`](../components/gcds-topic-menu.md) | `GcdsTopicMenu` | The theme and topic menu is a navigation to the top tasks of Government of Canada websites. |

## Structural

Top-level chrome (header, footer, language toggle, date stamps, search).

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-date-modified`](../components/gcds-date-modified.md) | `GcdsDateModified` | Date modified is an indicator of the last update to a webpage or application. |
| [`gcds-footer`](../components/gcds-footer.md) | `GcdsFooter` | The footer is the responsive Government of Canada branded footer landmark. |
| [`gcds-header`](../components/gcds-header.md) | `GcdsHeader` | The header is the responsive Government of Canada branded header landmark. |
| [`gcds-lang-toggle`](../components/gcds-lang-toggle.md) | `GcdsLangToggle` | The language toggle is a link to the same content in the other Official Language. |
| [`gcds-search`](../components/gcds-search.md) | `GcdsSearch` | Search is a space for entering keywords to find relevant information. |
| [`gcds-signature`](../components/gcds-signature.md) | `GcdsSignature` | The signature is the Government of Canada landmark identifier found in the header or footer. |

## Utility

Non-visual helpers.

| Tag | React | Summary |
| --- | ----- | ------- |
| [`gcds-sr-only`](../components/gcds-sr-only.md) | `GcdsSrOnly` | The screenreader-only component is text information only accessible with assistive technologies. |

## Deprecated and not-yet-implemented

These appear on the GCDS docs site but are **not** part of v1.1.0 and have no React component — do not use:

| Docs slug | Reason | Replacement |
| --------- | ------ | ----------- |
| `checkbox` (singular) | Deprecated in v0.35.0 | `gcds-checkboxes` |
| `radio-group` | Deprecated | `gcds-radios` |
| `data-table` | Placeholder page — component not yet built | Use a native `<table>` styled with GCDS tokens until shipped |
| `image` | Placeholder page — component not yet built | Use native `<img>` with GCDS spacing/container wrappers |

Track progress upstream at <https://github.com/cds-snc/gcds-components/releases>.
